channel.title: homematic-community/awesome-homematic Weekly Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track your favorite github awesome repo, not just star it.

item.title: homematic-community/awesome-homematic Jan 11th - Jan 17th, 2021
item.description:
Interfacing Software

  • homebridge-homematicipstars21 - Homebridgestars17.7k Plugin zur Einbindung von Homematic IP mit HmIP-HAP via Cloud.

item.title: homematic-community/awesome-homematic Nov 30th - Dec 6th, 2020
item.description:
Mobile Apps

  • Battery Status for HomeMatic - 💵 iOS

item.title: homematic-community/awesome-homematic Nov 23rd - Nov 29th, 2020
item.description:
CCU Addons

  • HAP-HomeMaticstars125 - RaspberryMatic / CCU3 addon to access your HomeMatic devices from HomeKit. Its much like https://github.com/thkl/homebridge-homematicstars166 but without homebridge.

item.title: homematic-community/awesome-homematic Nov 2nd - Nov 8th, 2020
item.description:
Misc Software

  • HMScriptEditor - A very simple macOS editor and runner for HomeMatic ("Rega") scripts.

item.title: homematic-community/awesome-homematic Aug 31st - Sep 6th, 2020
item.description:
Software Modules

  • homematic-gqlsstars1 - A GraphQL service to query Homematic IP components based on homematicip-rest-apistars137.

item.title: homematic-community/awesome-homematic Jun 15th - Jun 21st, 2020
item.description:
Misc Software

  • HomeHubstars7 - PHP/XML-API basiertes Webfrontend. Forum

item.title: homematic-community/awesome-homematic Jun 1st - Jun 7th, 2020
item.description:
Community Ressources (mostly german language)

  • Homematic Blog Lison - Blog, Tutorials und mehr..

item.title: homematic-community/awesome-homematic Mar 16th - Mar 22nd, 2020
item.description:
Misc

  • AskSinAnalyzerstars45 - Funktelegramm-Dekodierer für den Einsatz in HomeMatic Umgebungen, hilfreich zur Fehlersuche, z.B. wenn der DutyCycle zu hoch ist.
  • AskSinAnalyzerXSstars25 - AskSinAnalyzer als Desktop App, verzichtet auf den Einsatz eines ESP.

item.title: homematic-community/awesome-homematic Mar 2nd - Mar 8th, 2020
item.description:
CCU Addons

  • Patcherstars1 - CCU3 Addon zur komfortablen Anwendung von Patches.

    • Interfacing Software

  • CCU-Jackstars30 - CCU-Jack bietet einen einfachen und sicheren REST-basierten Zugriff auf die CCU, auch als Addon verfügbar.
  • homebridge-homematicstars166 - Homebridgestars17.7k Plugin zur Einbindung von Homematic Geräten in HomeKit.
  • hvl - Homematic Virtual Interfacestars47 - Bindet Fremdgeräte (z.B. Hue, Harmony, Netatmo, Sonos) über Plugins ein, auch als Addon verfügbar.

item.title: homematic-community/awesome-homematic Nov 4th - Nov 10th, 2019
item.description:
Misc

  • eagle-homematicstars1 - Homematic Modul Eagle Bibliothek.

item.title: homematic-community/awesome-homematic Aug 19th - Aug 25th, 2019
item.description:
CCU Alternatives

  • docker-ccustars34 - Homematic CCU firmware running as Docker container on arm and (emulated) x86.

item.title: homematic-community/awesome-homematic Aug 12th - Aug 18th, 2019
item.description:
CCU Alternatives

  • piVCCUstars244 - Install the original Homematic CCU firmware inside a virtualized container (lxc) on Raspbian or Armbian.

    • Documentation

  • Keymatic Konfiguration - Beitrag von rewe0815 im Homematic Forum.

item.title: homematic-community/awesome-homematic Jul 29th - Aug 4th, 2019
item.description:
Misc

  • Homematic 3D Druck Collection auf Thingiverse - Diverse Teile rund um Homematic zum selbst drucken.

item.title: homematic-community/awesome-homematic Jun 10th - Jun 16th, 2019
item.description:
Mobile Apps

  • @home - iOS - (💵 inApp-Purchase um Werbung zu entfernen)

    • CCU Alternatives

  • Homegear - Free and open source program to interface your smart home devices with your home automation software or your own scripts.

    • CCU Addons

  • CUxD - Der "Leatherman" für die CCU. Verbindet FS20, ... (💵 EnOcean, ...), stellt virtuelle Geräte und hilfreiche Tools zur Verfügung.
  • RedMaticstars419 - Node-RED als Addon für die Homematic CCU3 und RaspberryMatic. Liefert u.A. komfortable HomeKit-Integration und spezielle Nodes zur Anbindung der CCU an MQTT mit.
  • hm-printstars8 - CCU Programme drucken.
  • hm-toolsstars15 - Sammlung von Tools für RaspberryMatic.
  • hm_pdetectstars59 - Anwesenheitserkennung über die FRITZ!-Box

    • Interfacing Software

  • node-red-contrib-ccustars61 - Node-RED Nodes for the Homematic CCU.

    • Smart Home Software supporting Homematic

  • ioBroker

    • Misc Software

  • hm-simulatorstars2 - Simulates (partly) a Homematic CCU.
  • check_homematicstars3 - Nagios/Icinga Plugin for checking Homematic CCU.
  • hmcfgusb - Utilities to use the HM-CFG-USB(2) on Linux/Unix.
  • homematic-managerstars154 - Manage homematic interface processes (rfd/hs485d/homegear).
  • language-homematicstars4 - Adds syntax highlighting and snippets to HomeMatic Script files in Atom.

    • Software Modules

  • binrpcstars15 - Xmlrpc_bin protocol client and server Node.js module.
  • homematic-regastars5 - Node.js Homematic CCU ReGaHSS Remote Script Interface.
  • homematicip-rest-apistars137 - Python wrapper for the homematicIP REST API (Cloud / Access Point Based).
  • homematic-xmlrpcstars6 - Xmlrpc client and server Node.js module.
  • pmaticstars30 - Python API for Homematic. Easy to use.
  • pyhomematicstars77 - Python 3 Interface to interact with Homematic devices.
  • hm-discoverstars7 - Node.js module to discover Homematic CCUs and interfaces.

item.title: homematic-community/awesome-homematic May 6th - May 12th, 2019
item.description:
Community Ressources (mostly german language)

  • Homematic Forum: HomeMatic - Tipps für Anfänger - Pflichtlektüre für Einsteiger von Sammy
  • Homematic Guru - News, Blog, Tutorials und mehr.
  • Homematic Forum: Link/Skript-Sammlung - Curated link list by AndiN.

    • Smart Home Software supporting Homematic

  • everHome - 💵

item.title: homematic-community/awesome-homematic Feb 25th - Mar 3rd, 2019
item.description:
Mobile Apps

  • HistClient - (💵 inApp-Purchase) - CCU-Historian Client mit erweitereten Features für iOS und Android

    • Contents

  • Verschiedenes

    • Misc

  • Tablet Wallmount - Rahmen für Unterputzmontage von Tablets.

item.title: homematic-community/awesome-homematic Feb 4th - Feb 10th, 2019
item.description:
CCU Alternatives

  • debmaticstars129 - Install the Homematic OCCU on Debian based amd64, armhf and arm64 systems (Debian, Ubuntu, Raspbian, Armbian)

    • Mobile Apps

  • Home-24 - 💵 Android
  • HomeControl - 💵 iOS
  • TinyMatic - 💵 Android (ehemals: HomeDroid)
  • Pocket Control - 💵 iOS

    • Alternative Sensors, Actuators and Hardware Modifications

  • HAUS-BUS.DE - 💵 Homematic Wired kompatible Geräte.
  • stall.biz - 💵 Alternative Antennen, Multi Sensor für das Wohnzimmer, Wetterstation, ...

    • CCU Addons

  • Homeputer - 💵
  • CCU Historian - Langzeit Archiv und Graphen.

    • Smart Home Software supporting Homematic

  • IP-Symcon - 💵
  • Mediola - 💵
  • Home Assistant

    • Community Ressources (mostly german language)

  • Homematic Forum - Diskussions-Foren

item.title: homematic-community/awesome-homematic Jan 14th - Jan 20th, 2019
item.description:
Community Ressources (mostly german language)

  • Haus Automatisierung - News, Blog, Youtube, Tutorials, ...

item.title: homematic-community/awesome-homematic Dec 31st - Jan 6th, 2018
item.description:
Community Ressources (mostly german language)

  • Verdrahtet - News, Blog, Youtube, Tutorials, ...

item.title: homematic-community/awesome-homematic Dec 24th - Dec 30th, 2018
item.description:
Alternative Sensors, Actuators and Hardware Modifications

  • AskSinPPCollection - Einführung, Dokumentation und Projekte rund um Selbstbau-Komponenten mit AskSinPP
  • Beispiel_AskSinPPstars61 - Beispiel Sketche für die Verwendung der AskSinPPstars77 Bibliothek

item.title: homematic-community/awesome-homematic Sep 17th - Sep 23rd, 2018
item.description:
Contents

  • Smart Home Software

    • Documentation

  • Direktverknüpfungen im Expertenmodus - Vortrag von Frank Grass.
  • Virtuelle Aktorkanäle - Vortrag von Frank Grass.

    • CCU Addons

  • jqstars0 - jq packaged as Addon for the Homematic CCU3.
  • Redisstars1 - Redis packaged as Addon for the Homematic CCU3 and RaspberryMatic

item.title: homematic-community/awesome-homematic Jul 16th - Jul 22nd, 2018
item.description:
Community Ressources (mostly german language)

  • Homematic Inside - News, Blog, Tutorials und mehr.
  • Technikkram - News, Blog, Tutorials und mehr.
  • OwnSmartHome - News, Blog, Tutorials und mehr.

    • Documentation

  • Script Documentation - Inoffizielle Homematic Script Referenz.

    • CCU Alternatives

  • RaspberryMaticstars831 - Lightweight, OCCU and Linux/buildroot-based distribution for running a HomeMatic CCU on embedded devices like the RaspberryPi.

    • Alternative Sensors, Actuators and Hardware Modifications

  • Homematic Wired Hombrew Hardware - Verschiedene Homebrew Sensoren/Aktoren für Homematic Wired.

    • CCU Addons

  • Emailstars31 - HomeMatic CCU Addon für den Email Versand.
  • Homematic-addon-huestars41 - HomeMatic Addon für Philips Hue.
  • Mosquittostars18 - Mosquitto packaged as Addon for the Homematic CCU3 and RaspberryMatic
  • rmupdatestars34 - RaspberryMatic Addon das RaspberryMatic selbst aktualisieren kann, vereinfacht die WLAN Konfiguration mit GUI und kann andere Addons ohne Zwangsreboot installieren und aktualisieren
  • XML-APIstars88 - Vereinfachter CCU Zugriff via HTTP/XML.

item.title: homematic-community/awesome-homematic Nov 13th - Nov 19th, 2017
item.description:
Misc Software

  • occu-teststars3 - Automated System Tests of ReGaHss - the HomeMatic (O)CCU "Logic Layer".

item.title: homematic-community/awesome-homematic Oct 23rd - Oct 29th, 2017
item.description:
CCU Addons

  • homematic_check_mkstars16 - Addon for the Homematic CCU2 or a Raspberrymatic device which acts as an check_mk_agent.

item.description:
